All right, welcome to the before way in day first item for action, which is the keep them hot campaign. So this is a text messaging sequence that you are going to lead your new signups or new challengers through to keep them super engaged and motivated to do the challenge before the challenge begins. So as soon as you complete the sale, you're going to wait about 45 minutes and then you are going to send them the first text, which is going to be introducing them to the challenge and giving them some resources. So this should be coming from the accountability coach that will be helping them throughout the entire challenge. Now if that's you, if that's the gym owner, that's completely fine. Just you want it to be the person that they're going to be working with so you can build that report and let them know what to expect. So the purpose of these text messages is to keep the new client super excited about the challenge, starting the challenge by providing them a Facebook group that they can interact with and other challengers that are also starting the same, the same challenges them. Testimonials from Finnish challengers, which is absolutely crushed it and a way for them to connect with those people, a chance to post their why, basically the their individual reason as to why they signed up for the challenge. So they'll be able to read other people's why's and they'll be able to post their own and that really starts building that camaraderie. And then keeping communication strong while they're waiting for the challenge to begin. So you could sign somebody up and maybe their challenge doesn't start for another seven, 10, 14 days. You want to make sure that you are being super communicative with them during that process so they don't get cold feet and back out. Okay, so doing this will reduce the amount of people who get that cold feet and back out before the challenge begins, which can happen. They're super excited. They're super motivated to start the challenge. They come in, you explain everything, you over deliver, they get signed up and then they have to wait for 10 days before the challenge starts. Not all the time, but in some cases if you are going to be using the automated version. So there's instructions on exactly how to do that. You just follow it. One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine through 12 steps. There's 12 steps. It's super easy to do. You're going to customize a couple of things like your name, your gym's name. You're going to customize your Facebook page that you're putting them into, but it's pretty simple to do. The other way to do it is manually text them from your cell phone. So then you would just copy and paste or just follow these instructions and type them right into your phone. And it basically starts with something like, hey, and then the person's first name, this is, and then it would be your name or your challenge coach's name, whoever. Your challenge accountability coach, congrats on entering the challenge. I'm going to send you some cool resources before you get started to get you pumped up about the challenge. Feel free to contact me using this number if you need anything. So now we've established that line of communication between you and this member, and now they won't be going to anybody else or anything else if they have questions. They're going to go straight to you. And it should be the same person that's working with them during the entire challenge. So this is a great way to make that introduction. Basically right away after you send that first one, you're going to send a second text right away. That's going to say, oh yeah, I almost forgot. Click this link to join our exclusive VIP Facebook group for challengers only. And then here is the link that they can click on their phone to join the group. It should allow them to request access and then you just have to approve them. Station first, that's what will get sent out a couple days after your second text. Then it will take you through a couple questions of how are you liking the group so far? Do you have any questions? Just general report building. And then finally after two weeks, which is the 14 days, it says, hey, let me know. Let me know if there's anything you need. We want this to be an amazing experience for you with amazing customer service. If you don't want to bring all of your friends to the gym, we feel like we have failed. Okay, so please let us know what we would need to do to impress you enough to bring them along too. It's kind of a little jab at looking for some referrals. So that is the series of text messages. Just follow how many days go out in between them. You can copy and paste this to your different challengers if you're using a cell phone or whatever, however you're doing it. You can also go into SkiPio, which we will do now. And this will be the automated version. So you would click on campaigns. And if you wanted to import it, you would click on these three dots here. And then you would click on import campaign and you just paste that code in. And it'll automatically populate here. And it will look like this. So this is exactly what the Keep Them Hot campaign will look like. And here's how you customize it. So it will say start of campaign. And then you can click on the little arrow next to welcome. And it will say, after 45 minutes, it's going to send the information. So hey, first name. This is Tyler. And it's where you would be able to customize yours, your accountability coach. And then so on and so forth, like we just went through. Then you can click on the next one and you can see, hey, it waits one minute. And then it sends the next one. And it says, hey, this is your Facebook group. And then you can paste your group, your group's unique ID right here. And so on and so forth. So this is just a way that it automatically goes out to anybody that you put into this sequence using SkiPio. So to do that, to put somebody into this sequence, it's super simple. You would just go under Address Book. It might take a second to load. And here is all of your contacts. Now if you do not have this person as a contact yet, you'll have to add them. And you can do that by clicking Add New. And it's pretty simple, add contacts from your computer, add them manually. However you want to add people in. So once they are in there, that's when you can start adding them to a group. So let's say you signed up three challengers that day. You would just type their names in. So here's Bob. It'll allow me to select this person. Then I can search for maybe Joan. Maybe I signed her up. Okay. And then maybe I signed up Bill. Okay. So these are three people I signed up for that day. And you'll want to do this at the end of each day. So let's select. It looks like we're loading still. And we'll select this one here. So now we have, it looks like two contacts selected. We're still loading. Okay. Three contacts selected. And let's do one more for good measure. Okay. So here you can see that we have four contacts selected. And all we would do is click on Campaigns. And then we would highlight the one that says Keep Them Hot. Once you do that, after 45 minutes, that first message is going to go out. You don't have to touch anything. You don't have to send anything out. All you have to do is take a look at the messages when those clients start responding back to your text. So although this looks like an email platform, it's going to come right to their phone just like a text message will. And here is all the names of the people and their replies, replies back to you. So that's how simple it is. It's called the Keep Them Hot campaign. And it just makes sure that they're still motivated and super fired up before their challenge starts. And once their challenge does begin, we'll show you how you can start reaching out to them once they're actually in the challenge itself.
